items.briefing:
Healthcare organisations in Australia should be on alert, with new SonicWall research confirming cyberattacks on the healthcare sector continue to rise with no sign of slowing. Separately, Apple Mac users should be aware of a newly identified security gap in macOS that could allow users — or malicious software — to disable security tools, potentially leaving systems unprotected. IT teams using Macs should check for any available updates or patches.

With the FIFA World Cup underway, staff should be cautious of scam emails, fake ticketing sites, and phishing messages using the tournament as bait.

**Practical tip:** Be sceptical of any World Cup-related links or offers arriving by email or social media — go directly to official websites rather than clicking links.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's Essential Eight cybersecurity framework is being retired, requiring organisations to adopt new security standards.
